clusters.justification: This cluster reflects the broad processing of valence, autonomic arousal, and emotional states typically subserved by the salience and limbic systems.
These terms delineate the computation of incentive value, reinforcement learning, and motivated decision-making anchored in striatal and ventromedial prefrontal circuitry.
This domain encompasses self-referential and interpersonal representations, bridging autobiographical memory and social inference, which are the functional hallmark of the default mode network.
